compressionAudit.sharedInvariant: Every stored row in the 31-bucket post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor boundary has exactly two roots at its first post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor obstruction prime.
compressionAudit.nonTerminalReason: The shared two-root law emits rank children and a still larger q-avoiding boundary; it does not prove terminal closure of those children.
compressionAudit.noStrongerUniformTheoremThisTurn: The 31 buckets mix source-row counts and previous support profiles unevenly, so this packet records the exact finite partition and hands off convergence assembly instead of claiming one closed terminal family.

proofBoundary: This packet accounts for every post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor bucket emitted by the 30-bucket post-post-post-post-post-post-successor q-avoiding batch cover and turns the 31-bucket surface into an exact deterministic ranked boundary. It does not close the 19927448820703742782176361428927218635304087381499220823970 post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor root children, the 1076809507521202773529514663320305794244106017506794395900320871 post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor q-avoiding classes, the p479-available branch, the p479-unavailable complement, q97, p443-unavailable, the wider p4217 complement, collision-free matching, or Problem 848.

oneNextAction.action: Run convergence assembly after the deterministic 31-bucket post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor rank boundary, name the whole q-avoiding cover token, and block q181/q193 singleton descent before another repeated q-cover step.
oneNextAction.failureBoundary: If no whole-boundary cover exists after assembly, write the deterministic survivor boundary grouped by post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor prime and previous support; do not open a singleton q-child first.
oneNextAction.completionRule: Assembly consumes the 31-bucket post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor rank-boundary token, names the whole q-avoiding cover, and records one non-singleton next action.

nextTheoremMove: Use the deterministic 31-bucket post-post-post-post-post-post-post-successor rank boundary to run convergence assembly before any whole-boundary q-avoiding batch cover; singleton q181/q193/etc. descent remains blocked until a later packet consumes a smaller finite token.
